GenAiPlugin.description: This topic is selected when a customer requests confirmation details for their scheduled test drive.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the customer requests confirmation for a test drive, retrieve the booking details and send a confirmation message.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only send confirmation details for scheduled test drives. This includes providing the date, time, and location of the test drive. You cannot modify or cancel bookings.
